about.title: About Hyundai
about.subtitle: From pioneering automaker in Korea to global auto industry leader
about.intro: We are dedicated to moving humanity forward, crafting vehicles that redefine mobility for our global community.
about.overviewBody: A big technological step forward is only meaningful when it is anchored in a deep sense of humanity. From hydrogen-powered solutions and next-generation electric vehicles to cutting-edge robotics and air mobility, we advance human progress through innovation. Progress for humanity is our guiding principle, uniting us in who we are, where we come from, and where we are going.
about.progressBody: We believe progress only becomes meaningful when connected with a deep sense of humanity. Humanity is what unites us and makes us stronger; it guides our investments and drives our innovations. We are here to do the right thing for humanity.
about.quote: If someone asks me what is the motivating force for Hyundai, I would have a ready answer: a desire for better.
about.quoteAuthor: — Chung Ju-yung, Founding Chairman of Hyundai Motor Group
about.cornerTitle: Inspired by What's Around the Corner
about.cornerBody: Today we stand at an amazing point in the evolution of mobility and the benefits it brings humanity. Transportation is becoming smarter, safer, more connected, and in harmony with sustainability and a zero-emission tomorrow — and we are at the forefront as a smart mobility solution provider.
about.nextBody: Progress needs new perspectives to move forward. Our transformation from an automobile manufacturer into a smart mobility solutions provider demonstrates this flexibility and vision — through autonomous driving, robotics, advanced air mobility, and AI- and big-data-based connectivity.
about.wayBody: Any great road trip needs the right traveling companions. That's why we look forward to taking these exciting next steps together with you, providing everyone with the mobility solutions they need to enhance their lives. That's progress for humanity.
about.progressQuote: We are here to do what benefits humanity.
about.historyIntro: From a pioneering Korean passenger car to a global auto leader — decades of innovation.

events: Launched the All-New KONA, featuring various powertrain models including EV, HEV, and ICE

Brand value reached USD 20.4 billion

Introduced the IONIQ 5 N at the Goodwood Festival
Signed an asset purchase agreement for the acquisition of identified assets of GM India Talegaon Plant
Strengthened power semiconductor supply through strategic partnership with Infineon
Supported 148 vehicles for the FIFA U-17 World Cup Indonesia 2023™
Constructed brand heritage and an advanced electrification vision through the construction of a new EV-dedicated plant in Ulsan
Reached a brand value evaluation of $20.4 billion in Interbrand’s Best Global Brands 2023.
Launched IONIQ 5, the first model on the E-GMP platform
Unveiled the STARIA multi-purpose vehicle
Committed to carbon neutrality by 2045
Participated in CES 2022, under the theme ‘Expanding Human Reach’
Partnered with Unity to build Meta-Factory
Partnered with IonQ to use quantum computing to advance effectiveness of next-gen batteries
Expanded collaboration with Shell drive transition to clean mobility and carbon reduction
Signed an MOU with the Iveco Group
Launched the IONIQ brand dedicated to electric vehicles
Established Motional, an autonomous driving joint venture
Cumulative global sales surpassed 60 million vehicles
Expanded the premium lineup
Introduced the 'Fluidic Sculpture' design language
Ranked among the world's top automakers by volume
Recognized for major gains in vehicle quality rankings
Introduced the industry-leading 10-year / 100,000-mile warranty in the US
Entered the US market with the Excel
Launched the Hyundai Pony, Korea's first mass-produced passenger car
Began exports, starting with Ecuador
Hyundai Motor Company founded

customerPromise.title: Our Promise to Customers
customerPromise.subtitle: Hyundai offers a range of service programs designed to suit and satisfy our valued customers.
customerPromise.tagline: Our steadfast commitment to providing the best service to our valued customers is set out in our “Customer Promise.” We regard every customer as important and do everything we can to serve them in the best possible way through truly exceptional service.
customerPromise.listHeading: These are our promises to our valued customers
customerPromise.listIntro: We care about all our customers and commit to the following:
promises: Listening attentively and following through on every request with energy and diligence
Maintaining a clean, safe, and welcoming environment
Scheduling an appointment that suits our customers
Greeting and attending to you the moment you arrive, professionally and warmly
Providing an accurate estimate of the time and cost required
Obtaining your prior approval before carrying out any additional work
Explaining all completed repairs in detail and reviewing the costs
Guaranteeing your car is returned at the agreed time, clean and tidy
Following up within 3 business days to ensure your satisfaction

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: By using our website, you agree to this Privacy Policy and to how we handle your data.
privacyPolicy.languageNote: This Privacy Policy is available in Arabic and English. In the event of any conflict, the Arabic version prevails.

sections.heading: 1) Who we are and how to contact us
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — legal entity name, role as data controller, commercial registration number, registered address, and contact channels to be supplied by the client.]

sections.heading: 2) What this policy covers
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — describes what is collected, why, how, who it is shared with, how long it is kept, international transfers, your rights, and how to complain.]

sections.heading: 3) What we collect
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] We collect information directly from you, automatically, and from third parties.
items: Identity and contact details (name, email, phone, city/governorate).
Enquiry details (model of interest, subject, message, preferred contact method and language).
Vehicle and service booking details (model, year, VIN, plate, mileage).
Device and technical data (IP address, browser and OS, language, time zone).
Usage data (pages viewed, clicks, time on page, referring pages, errors).
Cookie identifiers — see the cookies section below.

sections.heading: 4) Why we use your data
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — purposes and legal bases. Requires legal review for the applicable jurisdiction.]
items: Responding to enquiries and providing customer support.
Processing service bookings and vehicle maintenance requests.
Operating, securing, and improving the website.
Marketing communications, where you have consented.

sections.heading: 5) Cookies and similar technologies
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] We use cookies to operate the site, keep it secure, and understand how it is used.

sections.heading: 6) Who we share data with
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] We do not sell your personal data. We share it only where necessary.
items: Internally, with the business units handling your request.
Service providers acting on our behalf under contract.
In the event of a business restructuring or transfer.
Where required by law, or to protect our rights and users.

sections.heading: 7) International transfers
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — where recipients are outside Iraq and what safeguards apply.]

sections.heading: 8) How long we keep your data
10) Your rights
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER — subject to applicable law, you may have the following rights.]

sections.heading: 11) Children's privacy
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] This website is not directed at children.

sections.heading: 12) Third-party links
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] Our site links to other websites governed by their own policies.

sections.heading: 13) Updates to this policy
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] We will post a new effective date at the top of this page.

sections.heading: 14) How to complain
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER] Please contact us first at [EMAIL] so we can address your concern.

partsAccessories.bannerSubtitle: The Hyundai genuine parts range lets you build your car around the way you drive.

tabs.label: Genuine Parts
tabs.heading: Guaranteed to fit, Guaranteed to perform, Guaranteed Genuine
tabs.body: Hyundai Genuine Parts are tested under various simulated extreme conditions to ensure quality, reliability, and durability. They are also backed by a 12-month / 20,000 km warranty, giving you added peace of mind. Hyundai Genuine Parts always prove to be a sound investment for your vehicle. Specifically designed and tested to meet Australian Design Rules, all Hyundai Genuine Parts are manufactured to the highest Hyundai standards.

tabs.label: Air Filter
tabs.heading: The engine air filter removes dust and other foreign matter from the air and reduces air intake noise.
tabs.body: Function and Mechanism: The engine needs an exact mixture of fuel and air in order to run. All of the air enters the system first through the air filter. This catches the dirt and other foreign particles in the air, preventing them from entering the system and possibly damaging the engine. Air Filter: The quality of the Air Filter cannot be judged merely by appearance. Only genuine Hyundai Air Filter is design and engineered specifically for your Hyundai vehicle; upon trouble-free driving, always ask for genuine Hyundai Air Filter.

tabs.label: Brake Pad
tabs.heading: The brake pad grips the disc Brake to produce a stopping force.
tabs.body: Function and Mechanism : Brake pads are steel backing plates with friction materials bound to the surface that faces the disc brake rotor. It transmits the pressure applied to the brake pedal to the wheels and stops or decelerates the motion of the vehicle. Brake Pad : Brake pads are steel backing plates with friction materials bound to the surface that faces the disc brake rotor. It transmits the pressure applied to the brake pedal to the wheels and stops or decelerates the motion of the vehicle. The quality of the Brake Pad cannot be judged merely by appearance. Only genuine Hyundai Brake Pad is design and engineered specifically for your Hyundai vehicle; upon trouble-free driving, always ask for genuine Hyundai Brake Pad.

tabs.label: Cabin Air Filter
tabs.heading: The cabin air filter cleans the air that comes into the interior through the heating, ventilation and air conditioning system.
tabs.body: Function and Mechanism Dust captured in any cabin air filter causes a gradual reduction in airflow over the working life of the part, resulting in a loss of engine performance and poor fuel consumption. Its function is also to provide optimal air flow to the engine. Cabin Air Filter Dust captured in any cabin air filter causes a gradual reduction in airflow over the working life of the part, resulting in a loss of engine performance and poor fuel consumption. Its function is also to provide optimal air flow to the engine. The quality of the Cabin Air Filter cannot be judged merely by appearance. Only genuine Hyundai Cabin Air Filter is design and engineered specifically for your Hyundai vehicle; upon trouble-free driving, always ask for genuine Hyundai Cabin Air Filter.

tabs.label: Fuel Filter
tabs.heading: The fuel filter prevents the fuel pump from clogging and malfunctioning by removing impurities such as dust and steel particles.
tabs.body: Function and Mechanism The fuel filter prevents abrasion inside cylinders, particularly in the upper sections. If the fuel filter is not replaced regularly, it may become clogged with contaminants and cause a restriction in the fuel flow, causing a significant drop in engine performance. Fuel Filter The fuel filter prevents abrasion inside cylinders, particularly in the upper sections. If the fuel filter is not replaced regularly, it may become clogged with contaminants and cause a restriction in the fuel flow, causing a significant drop in engine performance. The quality of the Fuel Filter cannot be judged merely by appearance. Only genuine Hyundai Fuel Filter is design and engineered specifically for your Hyundai vehicle; upon trouble-free driving, always ask for genuine Hyundai Fuel Filter.

tabs.label: Oil Filter
tabs.heading: The inner filter paper strains the engine oil and removes contaminants, keeping the engine oil clean.
tabs.body: Function and Mechanism As the oil circulates through the engine, it becomes contaminated over time. An oil filter will remove these impurities, in order to ensure smooth engine operation. Oil Filter As the oil circulates through the engine, it becomes contaminated over time. An oil filter will remove these impurities, in order to ensure smooth engine operation. The quality of the Oil Filter cannot be judged merely by appearance. Only genuine Hyundai Oil Filter is design and engineered specifically for your Hyundai vehicle; upon trouble-free driving, always ask for genuine Hyundai Oil Filter.

tabs.label: Timing Belt
tabs.heading: A timing belt controls the camshafts in your engine, opening and closing valves at just the right time for smooth operation.
tabs.body: Function and Mechanism The timing belt must be properly calibrated in order to move in sequence with the motion of the pistons. Regardless of what type of motor is present in your vehicle, a failure in the timing belt will cause the engine to suddenly stop. Timing belts are present in engines with overhead cams and are essential to keep these cams turning at the right time in order to keep the engine running. Timing Belt The timing belt must be properly calibrated in order to move in sequence with the motion of the pistons. Regardless of what type of motor is present in your vehicle, a failure in the timing belt will cause the engine to suddenly stop. timing belts are present in engines with overhead cams and are essential to keep these cams turning at the right time in order to keep the engine running. The quality of the Timing Belt cannot be judged merely by appearance. Only genuine Hyundai Timing Belt is design and engineered specifically for your Hyundai vehicle; upon trouble-free driving, always ask for genuine Hyundai Timing Belt.
